svg.title: Cold Key Compromise — Unconstrained OP_CHECKSIG Recovery Theft
svg.desc: Animated diagram showing how a compromised cold key can immediately redirect vault recovery funds to an attacker-controlled address via OP_CHECKSIG, with no constraints preventing the theft. Compares security across CTV, CCV, OP_VAULT, and CAT+CSFS recovery mechanisms.
svg.text: Cold Key Compromise — Unconstrained OP_CHECKSIG Recovery Theft
